title: NHAI Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: National Highways Authority of India has released the official Advisor Notification 2026 at NHAI Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NHAI Advisor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 65 years with a Degree in Electrical Engineering or Electrical and Electronics Engineering and relevant retired service experience at Chief Engineer level or above can apply online up to 09-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.details: Degree in Electrical Engineering or Electrical and Electronics Engineering from a recognized University/ Institute. Retired from Central/ State Government/ PSU/IIT/ Institute at the level equivalent to Chief Engineer or above. Experience in laying, operation and maintenance of electrical lines and sub-stations in Public Sector Undertaking or State Power Utilities.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHAI Advisor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHAI to complete the application.
